title: BEM-907 read context
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
keys = []
for line in text.splitlines():
    low = line.lower()
    if any(tok in low for tok in ['bem-899','bem-900','bem-905','bem-906','autonomous','operator_gate','ready','claude','audit']):
        keys.append(line)
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM907_AGENT_CONTEXT_READ.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-907 AGENT_CONTEXT read\nStatus: READ\nContext exists: ' + str(ctx.exists()) + '\n\nKey lines:\n' + '\n'.join(keys[-260:]) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM907 read AGENT_CONTEXT key lines')
"""
No issue comments.
